_purpose: Authored gate-string -> version-branch-subset mapping. Round-3 H3 (undelivered dependency of SP1.6 / A.9 branch-cell denominator). Every applicable gate string in scripts/conformance/spec_fields.json is mapped to a set of ordered DWG version branches; downstream build_ledger.py expands each (unit,row) into (unit,row,branch) cells by looking up the gate string here.
_authority: Manual authoring against the ODA §20.4 spec text conventions + libdxfrw's DRW::AC10xx enum. Round-3 requires an explicit mapping (no silent inference) and its sha256 pinned in SOURCES.json.

_notes.R14_Only_pseudo_gate: Nested inside the collapsed {R13-R14} branch; a real per-R14 verdict is unrepresentable without splitting R13 and R14. Recorded as branch=['R14-only-hint'] and downstream sweeps mark rows as unvalidatable-branch-fine-grained.
_notes.R24_alias: 'R24' is spec shorthand for 'R2010 through R2018' (per ODA §1 convention). Maps to all four AC1024/AC1027/AC1032 branches.
_notes.R14_plus_alias: 'R14+' is a rare alias meaning 'R14 and later' — maps to every branch starting from R13-R14.

special_gates._note: Conditional pseudo-gates that depend on runtime values, not a version branch. These do NOT expand a spec row into version-cells — they compound the row's parent version gate. The ledger records them as gate_conditional=<expr> and the branch is inherited from the enclosing static version gate.

_worked_example.note: Round-3 A.9 branch-cell denominator: 1 (unit,row) row -> 5 branch-cells. Aggregate over 1345 data rows with average expansion ~3.5 => ~4700 branch-cells, matching round-3's estimated 4000-6000.
